Meta.title: HF Sourcing | Independent China Factory Audit & Inspection
Meta.description: Independent factory audits, AQL inspections, and crisis negotiation in China. Flat rates, zero factory kickbacks, and a free first-line sanity check for serious buyers.

Home.announcement: Buyer-side only · Flat-rate inspection · 24h reporting · No factory kickbacks
Home.localTeamLine: I am your local team, not their partner.

hero.badge: Sourcing · Samples · AQL QC · FBA / DDP
hero.title: Find, verify, and ship from China without guessing who paid your inspector.
hero.subtitle: From sourcing & verification to sample hub, AQL on the line, and FBA / DDP out — one local team, flat or quoted prices, 24-hour reporting, and zero factory-side income to me. Compare the stack, not a generic inspection PDF.
hero.searchExample: a factory audit in Shenzhen before I wire 30% deposit — can you be there this week?
hero.searchNote: That is a real first message. Free triage → paid onsite when you are ready.
hero.imageAlt: Factory floor — on-site evidence for your report
hero.onTheFloorSub: Real photos, AQL logic, fail/pass you can show your bank.

services.title: The full China stack — compare like a G2 grid
services.lead: No hidden "factory marketing fees" — what you see is what funds the work. Start with a free line in, then add paid modules as your PO and risk grow.
services.pricingNote: Updated pricing · USD · + freight or custom where noted

entry.heading: The entry — free + verification
entry.lead: Most buyers start with a 10-minute sanity check, then go onsite before real money moves.

roadmap.heading: The roadmap
roadmap.lead: Sourcing → samples → QC on the line → logistics & FBA. Four modules, one relationship — your team on the ground, not the factory’s.

stages.heading: Then: samples, QC & e-com / FBA
stages.lead: When you are past the first supplier list, the real work is consolidation, in-line control, and getting shelf-ready without a second project manager. Again:

freeCard.satisfaction: Satisfaction — we earn the next step

paidModuleUi.featuredSub: Where most importers start paying for peace of mind

processSteps.label: Sourcing & verification
processSteps.detail: Backstop bad actors · negotiate with leverage

processSteps.label: Sample consolidation
processSteps.detail: One hub · unbox · compare before you order big

freeInsider.title: The "China Insider" Friend (100% Free)
freeInsider.slogan: Your First Real Connection on the Ground.
freeInsider.whyFree: I've spent 10 years in the system, and I'm tired of seeing honest Western buyers getting scammed or frustrated. I want to build a relationship first. If I can save you from a bad deal with a 10-minute chat, I've done my job as a friend. If you need me for an on-site audit later, you know where to find me.

included.title: Quick Factory Check
included.body: Send me a link or a name; I will tell you if they look like a real factory or a "bedroom" trader in 5 minutes.

included.title: Cultural & Business Translator
included.body: Confused by a factory's "vague" reply? I translate the real meaning behind their Chinese business talk.

included.title: General Sourcing Advice
included.body: Tips on shipping, local holidays, or market trends. No strings attached.

paidModules.title: Strategic Sourcing & Verification
paidModules.integrator: Supplier due diligence + price negotiation on the ground.
paidModules.focus: Find the right supplier, get the right price — before you send real money.
paidModules.whenToBook: Before you lock terms or pay a large deposit to a new vendor.

bullets.title: Real-world Verification
bullets.body: I don't trust Alibaba photos. I go onsite to verify their actual production capacity and legal DNA.

bullets.title: Price Negotiation
bullets.body: Using local knowledge and native language to cut through middleman markups and secure the best MOQs for you.

bullets.title: Factory vs. Trader
bullets.body: I expose "bedroom" trading companies posing as mega-factories.

paidModules.title: Smart Sample Consolidation
paidModules.focus: Save on freight, kill bad samples early.
paidModules.unit: + freight · (or per item — ask for a batch quote)
paidModules.whenToBook: When you are comparing 2+ suppliers and shipping samples from China is bleeding your margin.

bullets.title: 70% Logistics Saving
bullets.body: Send 5 factory samples to my hub. I combine them into ONE parcel to slash your international freight costs.

bullets.title: Unboxing Reviews
bullets.body: High-res video reviews of every sample before they leave China. If it's trash, we kill it early.

bullets.title: Quality Comparison
bullets.body: Side-by-side analysis to help you pick the winning supplier faster.

paidModules.title: Professional Quality Control (QC)
paidModules.integrator: Pre-shipment inspection + line monitoring + on-site dispute handling.
paidModules.focus: Reject bad goods, reject silent delays — before the 70% balance.
paidModules.whenToBook: Before final payment and before goods leave your supplier — every serious PO should pass this gate.

bullets.title: On-site AQL Inspection
bullets.body: Full check on functionality, packaging, and quantities before you pay the final 70%.

bullets.title: Timeline Monitoring
bullets.body: I'm the "headache" the factory fears. I monitor production lines so they don't miss your shipping date.

bullets.title: Dispute Resolution
bullets.body: If issues are found, I handle the rework negotiation on the factory floor, so you don't have to argue across the ocean.

paidModules.title: E-com Logistics & FBA Prep
paidModules.integrator: FBA prep + consolidated export + private label touches.
paidModules.focus: Shelf-ready, compliant, and branded — without a second project manager.
paidModules.whenToBook: When the PO is done and you need China-side prep + door delivery — tell me volume and channels.

bullets.title: FBA Compliance
bullets.body: Labeling, bagging, and palletizing that meets strict Amazon / Walmart requirements.

bullets.title: Global DDP Shipping
bullets.body: Sea, air, or rail. We handle customs and taxes so your goods arrive shelf-ready.

bullets.title: Private Labeling
bullets.body: Custom inserts, thank-you cards, and branded packaging to build your moat.

trustPillars.title: You pay. I work for you.
trustPillars.body: No factory commissions. No referral kickbacks. The invoice is between you and HF Sourcing.

trustPillars.title: Zero conflict of interest
trustPillars.body: If the supplier offers me a cut, you will know — and I walk away from that relationship.

trustPillars.title: Evidence you can use
trustPillars.body: Photos, line status, and AQL logic you can forward to your CEO, bank, or lawyer.

trustPillars.title: Fast, flat terms
trustPillars.body: Published prices. 24-hour reporting on standard inspections so you can decide before the wire.

comparisonItems.label: Big inspection brands
comparisonItems.text: Tick-box reports from people who don't understand your product or margin.

comparisonItems.label: "Free" sourcing agents
comparisonItems.text: Paid under the table by factories. They will not surface defects that hurt their commission.

comparisonItems.label: HF Sourcing — Max Huang
comparisonItems.text: 10 years in supply-chain systems. Paid only by you. I report what risks your money — not what makes the supplier happy.

integrity.title: Why the incentive line matters
integrity.lead: B2B marketplaces are built on transparent reviews. Your QC is no different: who funds the person in the WeChat group?

compareStrip.title: Same service — who gets paid twice?
compareStrip.lead: G2 differentiates by crowd truth. I differentiate by economics: one payer, one loyalty.

people.title: People, not a logo, buy trust.
people.body: Replace the stock image with a clear photo of you. On G2, people filter by product — here they choose who will walk into a factory and tell them the hard truth.
people.imageAlt: Your own photo: coffee, city street, Dongguan or Shenzhen

proof.title: Reviews from buyers
proof.lead: Structured like a marketplace review — with outcomes you can measure.

proofCards.name: David R.
proofCards.message: Max found a welding defect our supplier never mentioned. The report gave us enough evidence to stop the balance payment.

proofCards.name: Sophie M.
proofCards.message: The factory kept saying everything was ready. Max went onsite, counted cartons, and showed the order was only 62% finished.

proofCards.name: Marcus T.
proofCards.message: Not a checklist inspector. He explained why the defects happened and how to push the supplier into rework.

reportCta.title: See a full report before you book
reportCta.lead: Photo evidence, AQL, defect list — the same document you can forward internally.

Footer.about: Verification, sample hub, line QC, and FBA / export prep in South China. No factory funding — compare with confidence.
Footer.copyright: Inspired by market-style B2B clarity (e.g. G2). Not affiliated with G2, Inc.

AskMax.successTitle: Thank you. I have your context.
AskMax.successDescription: By the way, I just finished a similar case study last week. Here is the sample report. You might find it useful for your future quality control.
AskMax.beforeCallTitle: Before we jump on a call
AskMax.beforeCallDescription: Two short answers help me see whether you are a serious buyer, and how I can help in the first reply.
AskMax.labelHeadache: What is your biggest headache right now?
AskMax.placeholderSourcing: e.g. stainless steel cutlery, MOQ 2,000 sets — or paste a factory link or name
AskMax.placeholderHeadache: Factory ghosting, wrong samples, AQL fail last shipment…
AskMax.reachWithoutForm: You can also reach out without the form:
